texts.orig: CHILD POLICY
texts.text: CHILD POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Children aged 12 and above - Adult rate applicable
texts.text: Children aged 12 and above - Adult rate applicable

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Children aged 4-11 occupying their own room- 75% of the adult rate.
texts.text: Children aged 4-11 occupying their own room- 75% of the adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Children between 0-3 will be accommodated free of charge sharing with at least one full-paying adult.
texts.text: Children between 0-3 will be accommodated free of charge sharing with at least one full-paying adult.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) Children sharing adult rooms -50% of the adult rate.
texts.text: Children sharing adult rooms -50% of the adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) Maximum children sharing an adult room permitted is two and one for a single and double adult room respectively
texts.text: Maximum children sharing an adult room permitted is two and one for a single and double adult room respectively

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Game package Supplement: 180 USD = per vehicle per day (Includes: 2. Shared game drives within conservancy
texts.text: Game package Supplement: 180 USD = per vehicle per day (Includes: 2. Shared game drives within conservancy

texts.text: Adult  70 USD per day.

texts.label: list_item

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kindly Note the Conservancy fees are subject to change anytime soon.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Agent terms & conditions
texts.text: Agent terms & conditions

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These General Terms & Conditions by Naserian Mara Camp take precedence over terms and general conditions of sale otherwise used by Agent. Specific terms are detailed in the Rate Sheets or Sales Contracts.
texts.text: These General Terms & Conditions by Naserian Mara Camp take precedence over terms and general conditions of sale otherwise used by Agent. Specific terms are detailed in the Rate Sheets or Sales Contracts.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHECK-IN / CHECK-OUT
texts.text: CHECK-IN / CHECK-OUT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-in time is 12.00 hours and Check-out time is 10.00 hours. Early occupancy of rooms before indicated time is on a request basis.
texts.text: Check-in time is 12.00 hours and Check-out time is 10.00 hours. Early occupancy of rooms before indicated time is on a request basis.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: EXTRA MEALS
texts.text: EXTRA MEALS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Extra Lunch US$ 25.00 per person Picnic Lunch Box US$ 20.00 per person PRICES
texts.text: Extra Lunch US$ 25.00 per person Picnic Lunch Box US$ 20.00 per person PRICES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) In the event of any changes in Government taxes, Naserian Mara Camp reserves the right to adjust rates proportionately.
texts.text: In the event of any changes in Government taxes, Naserian Mara Camp reserves the right to adjust rates proportionately.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) In  the event of a change in the value of Kenya shilling by more than 5% by way of devaluation or currency fluctuation, Naserian Mara Camp may, at its discretion, increase the rates overleaf proportionate to the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the  date of devaluation.
texts.text: In  the event of a change in the value of Kenya shilling by more than 5% by way of devaluation or currency fluctuation, Naserian Mara Camp may, at its discretion, increase the rates overleaf proportionate to the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the  date of devaluation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION AND REDUCTION IN NUMBER POLICY;
texts.text: CANCELLATION AND REDUCTION IN NUMBER POLICY;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 60 and 46 days - 20% of the total costs will be charged.
texts.text: For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 60 and 46 days - 20% of the total costs will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 45 and 31 days - 50% of the total costs will be charged.
texts.text: For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 45 and 31 days - 50% of the total costs will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 30 days and a no-show, 100% of the total costs will be charged.
texts.text: For accommodation canceled or reduction in number between 30 days and a no-show, 100% of the total costs will be charged.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RESERVATIONS & PAYMENT TERMS
texts.text: RESERVATIONS & PAYMENT TERMS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To reserve and confirm space on any trip, Naserian Mara Camp requires a mandatory deposit of 30% based on the total value of the respective booking(s). Payment is required to secure the reservation and must be received in full by Bank Transfer 30-days before the guest's arrival. Cheque payments will only be accepted 7 days prior to the guest's arrival date.
texts.text: To reserve and confirm space on any trip, Naserian Mara Camp requires a mandatory deposit of 30% based on the total value of the respective booking(s). Payment is required to secure the reservation and must be received in full by Bank Transfer 30-days before the guest's arrival. Cheque payments will only be accepted 7 days prior to the guest's arrival date.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should payment not be cleared by the bank before the guest's arrival, the hotel reserves the right to request cash payment before the guest(s) check(s)  in.  Naserian  Mara  Camp  may  cancel  any  booking  and  release  any  room  for  which  payment  has  not  been  received.  No  refunds  or adjustments will be made for any portion of vacation or services not utilized. CREDIT
texts.text: Should payment not be cleared by the bank before the guest's arrival, the hotel reserves the right to request cash payment before the guest(s) check(s)  in.  Naserian  Mara  Camp  may  cancel  any  booking  and  release  any  room  for  which  payment  has  not  been  received.  No  refunds  or adjustments will be made for any portion of vacation or services not utilized. CREDIT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unless the Agent has approved credit facilities with Naserian Mara Camp the guest is required to make full payment prior to the guest's arrival.
texts.text: Unless the Agent has approved credit facilities with Naserian Mara Camp the guest is required to make full payment prior to the guest's arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INCIDENTAL CHARGES
texts.text: INCIDENTAL CHARGES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking out. Agents should advise their guests on the credit card facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Agent.
texts.text: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking out. Agents should advise their guests on the credit card facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Agent.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: MEETINGS AND EVENTS
texts.text: MEETINGS AND EVENTS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These rates do not apply to meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis.
texts.text: These rates do not apply to meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INVOICE DISPUTES
texts.text: INVOICE DISPUTES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Naserian Mara Camp's finance department within 7 days of the invoice date, failure to which the Agent will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and the Agent notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On the determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within 7 days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, actions, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya. CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Naserian Mara Camp's finance department within 7 days of the invoice date, failure to which the Agent will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and the Agent notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On the determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within 7 days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, actions, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya. CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Agent confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to the Agent and Naserian Mara Camp and the Agent shall not in any circumstances divulge or permit this Agreement to be divulged to any other person.
texts.text: The Agent confirms and agrees that this agreement is confidential to the Agent and Naserian Mara Camp and the Agent shall not in any circumstances divulge or permit this Agreement to be divulged to any other person.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: LIABILITY
texts.text: LIABILITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All bookings are accepted on the specific condition that Bush and Beyond Ltd. acts only as the reservation's office for the properties and assumes no liability whatsoever for any injury, damage, loss, accident, or delay to person or property. FORCE MAJEURE
texts.text: All bookings are accepted on the specific condition that Bush and Beyond Ltd. acts only as the reservation's office for the properties and assumes no liability whatsoever for any injury, damage, loss, accident, or delay to person or property. FORCE MAJEURE

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All parties shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence.
texts.text: All parties shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: AMENDMENTS
texts.text: AMENDMENTS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any amendments to this agreement should be made in writing and signed by both the company and the hotel.
texts.text: Any amendments to this agreement should be made in writing and signed by both the company and the hotel.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONTRACT CANCELLATION
texts.text: CONTRACT CANCELLATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30 days' notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation, all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable.
texts.text: The hotel reserves the right at any time, by giving 30 days' notice in writing, to cancel this agreement should the company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon cancellation, all sums outstanding from the company shall be immediately due and payable.

texts.orig: GOVERNING LAW
texts.text: GOVERNING LAW

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya.
texts.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto and shall supersede any other representation, agreement, statement, and understanding made prior to the execution thereof other than those expressly set forth.
texts.text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto and shall supersede any other representation, agreement, statement, and understanding made prior to the execution thereof other than those expressly set forth.

texts.orig: Amendments or additions to this Agreement shall be served in writing and shall be approved by the two parties. In witness whereof, the parties hereto have executed this agreement the day, month, and year first written below:
